title: Chef Aid Chrome Plated Wing Corkscrew, Traditional design with Lever Arm and Worm, Perfect for opening Wine and Beer Bottles
features: CHROME PLATED: This Wing Corkscrew is Chrome Plated which makes it heavy duty and has a mirror finish
LEVER ARMS: The lever arm design makes it extremly easy to open a bottle of wine as the Lever gently prises the cork from the bottle
DOUBLE ACTION: This Corkscrew has an intergrated Bottle opener and will cover all your barware needs
KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: This Bareware Tool is an essential Item for any home
CHEF AID offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Chrome-plated material, bottle opener functionality, and dishwasher safe
